title: microloma armatum
intro: Microloma armatum, also known as the "sensitive plant," is a species of flowering plant in the pea family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Microloma armatum include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory infections. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
